summary: First full regression for NilayNarayan Polychem LLP. Backend 22/22 pytest pass (health, products, 6 enquiry types, vendor create, auth success/fail, /auth/me guard, admin-protected lists, stats, PATCH status, MongoDB _id excluded). Frontend: home/hero loads, global CTAs + WhatsApp float visible, all 8 navigation routes return 200 with no console errors, Products page fetches backend and renders 8 cards with 8 TDS + 8 SDS links, Contact form -> success state, Vendor onboarding form -> success state, Quote dialog from header -> success state, admin /admin/dashboard redirects to /admin/login when unauthenticated, wrong-password shows 'Invalid email or password', correct login navigates to dashboard and renders overview/enquiries/vendors sections, status dropdown PATCH verified via API (enquiry flipped to in_progress).

minor.issue: When ID does not exist and status is also invalid, 400 is raised before 404 (status validation runs first). Acceptable but note: supplying a valid status with unknown ID correctly returns 404.

issues: Two logout buttons exist (top-right on overview, sidebar bottom). The top-right one (admin-logout-top) is only rendered on the overview tab, which can confuse tests/users. Consider keeping a single consistent logout in the sidebar or a persistent header slot.

action_items: (Optional) Unify admin logout control — currently admin-logout-top is only on overview tab while admin-logout-btn lives in the sidebar. Not blocking.

(Optional) Gracefully treat unknown status values in PATCH /api/enquiries/{id} only after verifying the enquiry exists (swap order of checks) — currently returns 400 for bad status even when ID is unknown.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan context for FastAPI >=0.110.
CORS: allow_origins is read from CORS_ORIGINS='*' and split(','); with allow_credentials=True, browsers reject wildcard. For production, supply explicit origin list in .env.
server.py is ~393 lines and still manageable, but consider extracting auth, models, and routers into modules before it grows.
SMTP send_email_async swallows failures with logger.error only — acceptable for best-effort but consider persisting a delivery_status on the enquiry doc for admin visibility.
Frontend stores JWT in localStorage (nn_admin_token). For a corporate admin panel consider httpOnly cookie to reduce XSS risk, per playbook guidance.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_* enquiries (6 types) and 2 TEST vendor submissions during automated runs. Admin dashboard currently shows 9 enquiries and 2 vendors. No production data was touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend hot-reloads; no server restart needed unless .env changes. Regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py and is invoked with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. BASE_URL is auto-read from /app/frontend/.env. For UI re-runs, use data-testid selectors exclusively (contact-*, vendor-*, quote-*, admin-login-*, admin-*). SMTP is intentionally placeholder (logs to backend console).
rca of the issue: No blocking issues found; no RCA needed.
